case_title: MARK C. WATSON VS. ANTHONY VEJMOLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,703.15 FILED BY WATSON, MARK C. DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF MARK C. WATSON AS TO DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARK WATSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY VEJMOLA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATSON, MARK C. DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF MARK C. WATSON AS TO DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATSON, MARK C. DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF MARK C. WATSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY $2,703.15 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,828.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED JUN-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL. AS TO DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,905.15 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 11/27/2017. AS TO DEFENDANT VEJMOLA, ANTHONY
